accounts.name: signer
docs: Can be the user (self-claim) or operator (batch claim).

accounts.name: burn_factory
docs: The burn program's FactoryAccount — used to validate the operator.

accounts.name: deposit_mint
docs: Optional: only required for deferred fixed pools (ratio_bps != 0)
to get deposit token decimals for ratio-based reward calculation.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Can be the user (self-claim) or operator (batch claim).

accounts.name: burn_factory
docs: The burn program's FactoryAccount — used to validate the operator.

accounts.name: deposit_mint
docs: Optional: only required for deferred fixed pools (ratio_bps != 0)
to get deposit token decimals for ratio-based reward calculation.

accounts.name: burn_factory
docs: The burn program's FactoryAccount — read-only for admin/treasury/fees.

accounts.name: launchpad_config
docs: Launchpad-local config PDA holding the pool counter.

accounts.name: burn_factory
docs: The burn program's FactoryAccount — read-only for admin/treasury/fees.

accounts.name: burn_factory
docs: The burn program's FactoryAccount — read-only for admin/treasury/fees.

accounts.name: reward_vault
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: reward_mint
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: user_reward_ata
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: treasury_ata
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: reward_token_program
docs: Optional: only required when reward is SPL (asset_reward_type != 2).

accounts.name: owner_deposit_ata
docs: Optional: only required for Fixed pools (ratio_bps != 0).

accounts.name: burn_factory
docs: The burn program's FactoryAccount — read-only for admin/treasury/fees.

docs: The burn program's FactoryAccount — read-only for admin/treasury/fees.

accounts.name: burn_factory

errors.name: InvalidRatio
errors.msg: Invalid ratio: denominator must be greater than zero

errors.name: RewardTooSmall
errors.msg: Reward amount too small (rounds to zero)

errors.name: BothAssetsNative
errors.msg: Deposit and reward asset cannot both be native SOL

errors.name: ZeroSaleTokenAmount
errors.msg: Sale token amount must be greater than zero

fields.name: ratio_bps
docs: 0 = Dynamic pool (burn-like), ≠ 0 = Fixed pool (swap-like) price numerator.

fields.name: ratio_denominator
docs: For Fixed pools: price denominator. For Dynamic: ignored.

fields.name: target_address
docs: Target address for Fixed pool (where deposits go).

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who created the pool.

fields.name: target_address
docs: Target address (e.g. where deposit goes for swap-like / Fixed pools).

fields.name: sale_token_mint
docs: Sale token mint (reward to distribute).  Pubkey::default() for native SOL.

fields.name: payment_token_mint
docs: Payment token mint (what users deposit). Pubkey::default() for native SOL.

fields.name: pool_id
docs: Unique sequential pool id.

fields.name: pool_start_ts
docs: Pool start timestamp (deposits accepted from).

fields.name: pool_end_ts
docs: Pool end timestamp (deposits accepted until).

fields.name: ratio_bps
docs: ratio_bps:  0 = Dynamic pool (burn-like), ≠ 0 = Fixed pool (swap-like).
For Fixed pools: token price numerator.

fields.name: ratio_denominator
docs: For Fixed pools: token price denominator (must > 0).

fields.name: settlement_fee_bps
docs: Settlement fee in bps applied on payout at deposit/claim time.

fields.name: deposit_balance
docs: Current payment token balance in the pool (deposits minus any collected).

fields.name: reward_balance
docs: Current sale token balance remaining in the pool.

fields.name: reward_cap
docs: Total sale tokens locked at creation (immutable after creation).

fields.name: asset_type
docs: 0: SPL, 1: SPL2022, 2: SOL — for payment token.

fields.name: asset_reward_type
docs: 0: SPL, 1: SPL2022, 2: SOL — for sale token.

fields.name: status
docs: Pool status.

fields.name: paused
docs: Paused flag.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

fields.name: is_close
docs: Emergency close flag.

fields.name: is_collected
docs: Whether deposited payment tokens have been collected by admin.

fields.name: name
docs: Pool name.

fields.name: total_deposited
docs: Total payment tokens deposited by all users.

fields.name: is_auto
docs: For operator automate claim

fields.name: is_instant
docs: For fixed pool

fields.name: amount
docs: Total payment tokens deposited by this user.

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether the user has claimed their sale tokens (Dynamic pools only).
